name: rule id namespacing: rule id must match `^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*(/[a-z][a-z0-9-]*)?$` (lowercase kebab; optional plugin/ namespace)
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules:
  - {id: g-Bad_ID, name: x, description: x, detector: x, type: problem, fixable: null, has_suggestions: false, deprecated: false, replaced_by: [], docs_url: https://x.com, requires_type_checking: false, recommended: true, options_schema: {}, messages: {default: x}, severity: P1, version: 1.0.0, semver: 1.0.0, rule_state: warn-only, provenance: [{source: x, class: published-standard, section_id: x, url: https://x.com, fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:S}]}
recommended_set: []
all_set: [g-Bad_ID]
' > tree/google/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --check-id-namespacing
